Beyond Mexican Classics
Creative alternatives when you’re craving something different.
The Nut so Green Go Salad
$14.00
Arugula, dried cranberries, queso fresco, toasted walnuts & mustard vinaigrette.
Brioche Bravo
$16.00
Spicy fried chicken smothered in buffalo sauce, pimento cheese, chipotle aioli, and mixed greens on a buttery brioche bun. Served with fries.
Not into heat? We’ll hold the buffalo — just say the word.
El Verde Fino
$15.00
Grilled chicken, pesto, arugula, avocado, tomato & pepper jack on ciabatta. Served with fries.
Clean. Bold. Balanced.
Order it without cheese or pesto for a lighter option.
